sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, date_col DATE, value FLOAT);
SELECT arbitrary(first(date_col + INTERVAL (CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE value END) DAY)) FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT arbitrary(first(date_col + INTERVAL 5 DAY)) FROM (SELECT date_col, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery GROUP BY date_col;
SELECT date_col, arbitrary(first(value)) FROM test_table WHERE value >= 15 GROUP BY date_col ORDER BY date_col + INTERVAL 10 DAY;
SELECT first(date_col + INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL)) AS filtered GROUP BY date_col ORDER BY first(value);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT arbitrary(first(value)) FROM temp_table GROUP BY id HAVING arbitrary(first(value)) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, arbitrary(first(date_col + INTERVAL 2 DAY)) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE date_col < DATE '2023-01-15') AS filtered GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, arbitrary(first(date_col + INTERVAL (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) DAY)) FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
